DP.427.0000:
Hohoho...
They call me Grandma Wilma.\f
I came out here by myself from
a town of Dragon Tamers.\f
I can teach the strongest of all
Dragon-type moves to the tough\r
Pokémon of Sinnoh.\f
Would you like me to teach that
move to one of your Pokémon?
DP.427.0001:
Ah, it is you again...\f
Would you like me to teach the best
Dragon-type move I know to one of\r
your Pokémon?
DP.427.0002:
Well, perhaps if you change your
mind, do come back.
DP.427.0003:
I see...
I like your sense of adventure.\f
However, none of the Pokémon with
you now can learn the move.
DP.427.0004:
Fine, fine, now pick the Pokémon
I should teach the move to.
DP.427.0005:
Sorry to disappoint you...\f
That Pokémon you have can learn this
move, but it hasn’t come to trust\r
you fully yet...\f
Until then, I can’t make it learn
this move.
DP.427.0006:
Sorry to disappoint you...
That Pokémon can’t learn this move.
DP.427.0007:
Hmmmm...\f
Teaching a move to an Egg is
a challenge that’s beyond me.
DP.427.0016:
Draco Meteor’s destructive power
is awe inspiring.\f
However, using it will also lower
the Pokémon’s Special Attack.
